description: Golden fixture: is_trading_day() for known fixed US market dates. All expected values derived from NYSE/US equity market schedule — NOT captured from any implementation.
derivation: NYSE holiday schedule (US equity markets). Sources: NYSE Holiday Schedule 2024/2025, pandas-market-calendars XNYS calendar. Regular weekdays (Mon-Fri) with no holiday are True; weekends always False; listed NYSE holidays are False. Each date is annotated with the calendar authority reason.

cases.reason: Christmas Day — NYSE holiday (Federal + exchange holiday)
Thanksgiving Day 2024 — NYSE holiday (4th Thursday of November)
Martin Luther King Jr. Day 2025 — NYSE holiday (3rd Monday of January)
Presidents Day 2025 — NYSE holiday (3rd Monday of February)
Good Friday 2025 — NYSE holiday (Friday before Easter)
Memorial Day 2025 — NYSE holiday (last Monday of May)
Independence Day 2025 — NYSE holiday (Friday, not observed-on-Monday)
Labor Day 2024 — NYSE holiday (1st Monday of September)
Veterans Day — NOT a NYSE holiday; US equity markets trade normally
Day after Christmas (Thursday) — regular trading day
Regular Wednesday — no holiday, normal trading
Regular Monday — no holiday, normal trading
Saturday — weekend, never a trading day
Sunday — weekend, never a trading day
